An '''unidentified prisoner''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], who had been sentenced by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to a life term on the [[Prison/Legends|prison]]-world of [[Despayre]]. During the trip down to the penal colony there, he attempted to force a relationship with [[Teela Kaarz]], who simply pretended that her last "bunkmate" had died of "natural causes". Mollified by the bluff, he attempted no further advances on the [[Mirialan/Legends|Mirialan]].

{{Char-stub}}
